metadata.name: Advanced KYC Voting Verifier
metadata.description: Requires voters to prove inclusion in the registered voter Merkle tree.
metadata.author: zkVote Thesis Project

userInputs.label: Voter Secret
userInputs.description: The unique secret code generated during your registration.

userInputs.label: Your Age
userInputs.description: Used to generate the proof that you meet the minimum age requirement.

computedInputs.description: Fetches the valid Merkle root from the Verifier contract.
Fetches the minimum age requirement from the contract.
Positional indices for the Merkle proof.
The ID of the current poll.
